a:["$","div",null,{"className":"grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3","children":[["$","div","What you’ll learn",{"className":"rounded-[26px] border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.04] p-5","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-white/42","children":"What you’ll learn"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-3 text-sm leading-7 text-white/62","children":"How to build a proposal panel, vote controls, reveal and execute states, and voice-assisted commands while preserving the signer boundary and privacy posture."}]]}],["$","div","Why this matters on Solana",{"className":"rounded-[26px] border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.04] p-5","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-white/42","children":"Why this matters on Solana"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-3 text-sm leading-7 text-white/62","children":"Governance UX collapses when voting intent leaks too early or when execution feels like a protocol-debugging ceremony.
